name: Shrimp and Rice Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat water, vegetable stock powder, and garlic.
2. Add chopped carrot and cook until tender-crisp.
3. Add onions and mushrooms. Cook for about 4 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and heat through.
5. Add cooked rice and soy sauce. Heat through and serve.
If there seems to be a lot of liquid in the pan after adding the shrimp, drain most of it off before adding the rice and soy sauce.
